text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Hah…! Hah…!
Haaah… haaah… haaah…!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Hah…
…What do you think…, Cafe…?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: …I'm surprised.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
All I taught you was how to focus and confront
yourself. And yet you… drove yourself all the
way to very limit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Right now… there's another world behind you.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Ah, Cafe. You have my deepest gratitude.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: So this… is who I truly am.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: My heart has already drawn close to that place. Now all that remains… is for this body to overcome its trial.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Shuka Sho. Kyoto Racecourse
was in an absolutely unbelievable frenzy.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista! Definitely Buena Vista!! Did you
see her runs in the Oka Sho and Oaks!? It
doesn't even feel like she can lose!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but Red Desire looks seriously ready
too…! The awakening of the saint, I can't wait
to see it!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Buenaaaaa!! Show us that breathtaking view!!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
…This is insane. Every single one of 'em's
burning up.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text: According to The 1st, Buena still has overwhelming support… Looks like her streak at the top continues as well.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Desire is certainly formidable… and yet,
even so, most people still believe in Buena.
…Fascinating.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Heh… I get it now. So the head of the
Expedition Committee herself, the great
Dream Journey who is always charging at the
frontlines…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
…came all the way to Kyoto because of Buena
Vista, huh? You're paying real close attention
to her.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
Of course. After all, she's standing at the
center of the storm, the center of an era in
the making.

text_block_list.name: Dream Journey
text_block_list.text:
And you feel it too. That's why you're here,
isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
…The Kikuka Sho's next, so I figured I'd watch
while I'm here…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Nah. I ain't gonna hide behind excuses. Yeah.
I came to see her.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Outta everyone in our generation, she's the
best prey there is. And if she can answer all
this madness…

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: …then she's the real deal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Roooooaar……!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The overwhelming excitement pierced against
my skin… and Buena Vista was surely feeling
an even larger wave… something far greater.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
—Win!!
—Give us a blazing race!!
—A battle to the very limit!!!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(…I have to win. A blazing race. A battle at
the limit…!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: ……Huh?
choice_data_list: Something like what we had in Hokkaido?
Something like what we had in Hokkaido?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hokkaido…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Saaahhhh……)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
choice_data_list: Since it's Kyoto, how about matcha flavor?
Since it's Kyoto, how about matcha flavor?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …No, I'm okay!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
But instead, after the race… wanna get some
together?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: A little victory reward! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Of course! From here on, I think I can accept
it all head-on.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Yeah. So, you see…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Could you fill my heart… with your expectations
instead?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
That way, I won't lose myself… I'll be able to
run the way I should.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
If I can give it everything I've got… then I'm
strong. Right?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah…!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Wooaaaaaaaah…!!!)

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"Buenaaa!!"
"With those legs, you can absolutely win!!"

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
"Go for it!!"
"Show us a race that'll go down in history!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Yeah. I'm okay now!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank you so much for always
supporting me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
We've finally made it to the Shuka Sho, the
last race of the Triple Tiara route. And today…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'll bring you a breathtaking view… greater
than any race before it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Ooooooohh—!!!!)

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Can you hear my voice?

text_block_list.name: Spectator C
text_block_list.text:
…W-What the—? There's… light shining
behind her…?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: That place lies just ahead. I have come close enough to reach it… simply by stretching out my hand.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: And now… I have one request for all of you.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Look upon me. Revere me… and with your
hearts, lift me higher still.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
From this moment on… place all your prayers
in my hands.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Desire. You've worked so, so hard… haven't
you.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I can feel it so clearly. That determination to
make it happen… stronger and stronger.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hey, Desire. Can you feel my feelings too?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Everyone believes in me… There are people
waiting for that breathtaking view.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
My world is right here. And I'll answer
everyone's hopes myself!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
…Hehe. Ahaha…! You truly are… overflowing
with light.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
That is exactly why you are the trial bestowed
upon me. Now then, let us begin!!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: I am the one who shall…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Reach it!

text_block_list.name: Buena & Desire
text_block_list.text:
—The breathtaking view we seek!
—The world I was meant to reach!
